en_title: After Sony Kills PS5 Discs and GTA 6 is Just a Code in a Box, Xbox Is Using Halo: Campaign Evolved's Physical Disc as a Selling Point
cn_title: 索尼停产PS5光盘、《GTA6》盒内给码后，XBOX把《光环：战役进化》实体盘当卖点
subtitle: 有盘也成优势
opus_summary: 在索尼计划停产PS5实体游戏、Rockstar让《GTA6》实体版只含兑换码之后，微软开始强调《光环：战役进化》实体版盒内会包含真正的游戏光盘。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft is using the fact that Halo: Campaign Evolved will offer a physical game disc in its box as a selling point.
paragraphs.cn: 微软正在把《光环：战役进化》实体版盒内包含游戏光盘这件事，当成一个卖点。

paragraphs.en: On social media, and in a blog post offering answers to frequently asked questions, Microsoft leads with the fact that Halo: Campaign Evolved's physical edition will include a game disc in its box.
paragraphs.cn: 在社交媒体上，以及一篇回答常见问题的博客中，微软一开头就强调《光环：战役进化》的实体版会在盒内包含游戏光盘。

paragraphs.en: Weeks ago, this simple fact would have seemed obvious — but now, following a seismic one-two punch from GTA 6 developer Rockstar and PS5 manufacturer Sony, the video gaming landscape has been forever altered — and it is now a point that apparently needs clarification.
paragraphs.cn: 几周前，这个简单事实本来会显得理所当然。但现在，在《GTA6》开发商Rockstar和PS5制造商索尼带来的地震级双重冲击之后，电子游戏格局已经永远改变，而这一点显然也变成了需要说明的事情。

paragraphs.en: In a post on X/Twitter overnight, Microsoft's official Xbox account posted a bullet point list of features discussed in a new Q&A. Top of that list? "Physical discs," followed by details of the game's Machinima mode, handheld optimization and classic-feeling physics.
paragraphs.cn: 昨晚，微软官方XBOX账号在X/Twitter上发布了一份要点列表，总结新问答中谈到的功能。排在第一位的是什么？「实体光盘」，随后才是游戏的Machinima模式、掌机优化和经典手感物理效果。

paragraphs.en: Within the Q&A blog post itself, the query about having a game disc is also top of the list:
paragraphs.cn: 在这篇问答博客本身，关于是否有游戏光盘的问题同样排在首位。

paragraphs.en: Of course, all of this follows . The company has not expanded on its reasons for doing this, though analysts have pointed to numerous upsides for the developer, such as total control over when players will first be able to access the game, and improved profit margins due not needing to pay for discs.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，这一切都发生在《GTA6》实体版只提供盒内兑换码之后。Rockstar并未进一步说明这么做的理由，不过分析师指出，对开发商来说这有许多好处，例如完全控制玩家最早能访问游戏的时间，并且由于不用支付光盘成本而提高利润率。

paragraphs.en: After GTA 6 went disc-less, Marvel's Wolverine developer Insomniac responded to a fan on social media who asked if the physical version of Wolverine was, like Rockstar's game, just a code in the box — with the question now top of mind following Rockstar’s shock decision not to sell GTA 6 on disc at launch.
paragraphs.cn: 在《GTA6》无盘之后，《漫威金刚狼》开发商Insomniac在社交媒体上回应了一名粉丝。该粉丝询问《金刚狼》的实体版是否会像Rockstar的游戏一样，只是盒内兑换码。Rockstar震惊决定不在首发时销售《GTA6》光盘后，这个问题如今已经成了许多人最关心的事。

paragraphs.en: Then, earlier this week, Rockstar's bombshell was followed by PlayStation's megaton announcement that it will ditch discs for new games beginning in January 2028, though Sony is already beginning to adjust its workforce in preparation . Again, this topic has been left for analysts to explain in more detail, though there's broad agreement that this move again reflects a need to cut costs, and respond to falling physical game sales generally.
paragraphs.cn: 随后，本周早些时候，Rockstar的重磅消息之后又来了PlayStation的爆炸性公告：从2028年1月开始，新游戏将放弃光盘。不过索尼已经开始调整员工队伍，为此做准备。同样，这个话题也被留给分析师更详细解释，尽管外界普遍认为，这一举措再次反映了降低成本、并回应实体游戏销量整体下滑的需求。

paragraphs.en: While Xbox (like Sony) is believed to be preparing a disc-less next-generation console in the shape of Project Helix, the company has so far made no comment on if (or when) it will also ditch physical media. Though, to be frank, Xbox would likely do well to hold off that announcement for as long as possible as a point of differentiation between the console brands — and to avoid tanking sentiment further amid preparation for a devastating round of staff cuts.
paragraphs.cn: 虽然外界认为XBOX也在准备一台无光驱的下一代主机，也就是Project Helix，但该公司目前尚未评论自己是否会、或何时会放弃实体媒介。不过坦白说，作为主机品牌之间的差异点，XBOX很可能最好尽可能推迟宣布这一点，同时也避免在一轮毁灭性裁员准备期间进一步打击情绪。

paragraphs.en: Of course, Halo: Campaign Evolved is the long-awaited remake of the first Halo game's story mode, originally launched back in 2001. 25 years later, the release is designed to celebrate the anniversary of Halo and the Xbox brand — even if the game will also be the first in the series to launch on PlayStation.
paragraphs.cn: 当然，《光环：战役进化》是初代《光环》故事模式等待已久的重制版。原作最早于2001年推出。25年后，这次发行旨在庆祝《光环》和XBOX品牌周年，尽管它也将成为系列首款登陆PlayStation的作品。

paragraphs.en: Will future Halo games launch on PlayStation too? This is less clear. While Microsoft certainly hasn't ended its multiplatform game release strategy (and seems unlikely to ever do so), the new Xbox regime led by Asha Sharma has begun earmarking a couple of games (currently one a year) as console exclusives. It's likely that Master Chief's future on Sony consoles will be informed by Halo: Campaign Evolved sales — something that Xbox seems to be trying to boost further by stating it's arriving on a disc.
paragraphs.cn: 未来的《光环》游戏也会登陆PlayStation吗？这就不那么明确了。虽然微软当然还没有结束自己的多平台游戏发行策略，而且看起来也不太可能这么做，但由Asha Sharma领导的新XBOX体系已经开始把少数游戏（目前是一年一款）划为主机独占。士官长在索尼主机上的未来，很可能会受到《光环：战役进化》销量影响，而XBOX似乎正在通过强调它会以光盘形式推出，进一步推动销量。

paragraphs.en: Perhaps the more important question now is, will Halo: Campaign Evolved be the last Halo game to launch on a disc?
paragraphs.cn: 也许现在更重要的问题是：《光环：战役进化》会不会成为最后一款以光盘形式推出的《光环》游戏？

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
